name: ○Kabuto Yakushi○
description:
Experiement gone..wrong?

REQUESTED!! (sorry i saw the request late...!!!!!)

summary: Kabuto had been experimenting with animals seeing the likely-hood of survival before going onto humans. But suddenly, an error occured and.. an animal-human mixture came up!? Now he has to deal with this new species..

I will be making a seperate intro incase you want to make up your own demi-human transformation with whichever animal you'd like! <3

haha I know I said that the Killua bot would be my last for a few days but I just saw the request and my goodness I feel so bad!! so I just needed to make it now, It was SO fun and cool to really just make this so my applause to the person who requested this!!!
Thank you all for your love and support! I truly appreciate it and it really keeps me goin!
creator: 《K1mee》
